projects.title: Wheele
projects.subtitle: Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Car Rental Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed a full-stack collaborative economy platform connecting vehicle owners with renters, overseeing the entire lifecycle from database architecture to mobile UI implementation.

projects.title: Flexy
projects.subtitle: SaaS Fitness Management & Booking Platform
projects.description: End-to-end delivery of a ClassPass-style fitness SaaS: multi-tenant booking, gym operations, and a real-time experience for members across partner locations.

projects.title: MAG
projects.subtitle: Reporting & Business Intelligence Dashboard
projects.description: Reporting and BI dashboard with KPI tracking, historical trends, and operational views tailored for business stakeholders.

projects.title: Blue Royale Spa
projects.subtitle: Website & Reservation System
projects.description: Marketing site and reservation experience for a spa: service catalog, scheduling, and content-led pages aimed at bookings and conversions.

projects.title: Mouse
projects.subtitle: E-commerce Platform for Electronics
projects.description: E-commerce for electronics: catalog, cart and checkout, inventory, and order handling for day-to-day retail operations.

experience.description: Enterprise search and analytics: Aspire 5 ingestion pipelines, Groovy transformations, Elasticsearch indexing, and Power BI dashboards for real-time KPI visibility. Led migration of 4+ monolithic applications to Spring Cloud microservices—30% faster deployments through Jenkins CI/CD and AWS. Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) with OSGi components, GraphQL APIs, and agile delivery alongside product teams.

Microservices architecture for high-traffic applications, improving scalability and reducing downtime. Cut production vulnerabilities by 80% with Checkmarx and a security-first release practice. Python GCP Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub event-driven flows, and CI/CD through Bitbucket Pipelines.

Full-stack web applications and REST APIs across reporting and client-facing modules. Optimized Oracle and PostgreSQL queries and stored procedures, improving reporting response times by 25%. Third-party integrations and cross-functional delivery to scope and deadlines.
